title: gladiolus luteus
intro: Gladiolus luteus, also known as the yellow gladiolus or African corn lily, is a plant species belonging to the genus Gladiolus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Gladiolus luteus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Gladiolus luteus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory infections.
